iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Cfn: A signal that represents static information about the vehicle, such as engine type or manufacturing date.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.All.Description: (Optional) A list of possible values an attribute can be assigned.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Ass.Description: (Optional) A specified value for the attribute.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Dat.Description: The specified data type of the attribute.
iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Dat.Allowed values: BOOLEAN | BOOLEAN_ARRAY | DOUBLE | DOUBLE_ARRAY | FLOAT | FLOAT_ARRAY | INT16 | INT16_ARRAY | INT32 | INT32_ARRAY | INT64 | INT64_ARRAY | INT8 | INT8_ARRAY | STRING | STRING_ARRAY | UINT16 | UINT16_ARRAY | UINT32 | UINT32_ARRAY | UINT64 | UINT64_ARRAY | UINT8 | UINT8_ARRAY | UNIX_TIMESTAMP | UNIX_TIMESTAMP_ARRAY | UNKNOWN

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Def.Description: (Optional) The default value of the attribute.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Des.Description: (Optional) A brief description of the attribute.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Ful.Description: The fully qualified name of the attribute. For example, the fully qualified name of an attribute might be `Vehicle.Body.Engine.Type`.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Max.Description: (Optional) The specified possible maximum value of the attribute.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Min.Description: (Optional) The specified possible minimum value of the attribute.

iotfleetwise.signalcatalog.attribute.Uni.Description: (Optional) The scientific unit for the attribute.
